name: deploy-check
intent: Provide an explicit deploy readiness command invoked by the user.

interface.description: Runs a read-only deploy readiness checklist for the requested environment when invoked explicitly.

security.bashJustification: No Bash is used; command stays read-only with file/search tools.

context.reason: Slash command is explicit and short; it does not need a separate skill fork.

risks: Command should remain read-only unless a separate approval gate is added.
